summary: STALE / already-fixed. EXP-254 c1 H1-H3 all addressed in current sections.json. H1 (observed vs physical altitude pre-empt): present ("two values: "Sun altitude (Observation): 5,733 km" and "Sun altitude (Physical): <4,200 km"... Repeating the calculation with the dome's physical altitudes"). H2 (stationary-spot framing): current text reads "The dome geometry produces a narrow ~1.3-km-wide track tracing the Moon's transit overhead, vs. the observed 294-km swath — a ratio of roughly 1:220 in width" — matches curmudgeon recommendation verbatim. H3 (lateral velocity 87 km/min upper-bound caveat): "an upper bound for a rim-radius orbit, equivalent to ~2°/min apparent shadow speed at zenith; a more typical mid-disc orbit ... yields ~25 km/min, or ~0.5°/min at h_Moon=2,534 km" — also matches. Operator-rescue commit 228df642 shipped these. Recommend close.
verification: All three pre-empt phrasings verified in data/sections.json via targeted grep.
